title: Added SemVer tag compare to sync and a 'noop' option.
body:
This PR adds support for semver constraints in the sync command using hashicorp go-version module.

It also adds a 'noop' option which skips the actual copying of the containers.

```
sync.yaml:
...
    images-by-semver-compare:
        busybox: ">=1.29, <1.35"
```

Signed-off-by: Frank Ederveen <frank.ederveen@gmail.com>

comments.body: @senax Are you still interested in this?  @mtrmac @vrothberg Should we take this over or close if @senax is not going to continue working on it?
